description_long: This is a compact, handheld electric drill with a predominantly yellow and black color scheme, featuring a robust plastic housing and ergonomic handle. The drill is equipped with a metallic twist bit extending from the front chuck, suitable for general-purpose drilling tasks. The base of the handle houses a rectangular battery pack, providing cordless operation and easy portability. The body includes visible seams and a few small screws, indicating assembly points, and a trigger button is integrated into the handle for user control. The front section is slightly flared to accommodate the chuck and bit, while the rear is streamlined for balance. The branding 'DRILCO' is visible on the battery pack, and there are no visible power cords, emphasizing its battery-powered design.
description: A yellow and black cordless electric drill with a metallic twist bit, ergonomic handle, and visible battery pack. The design is compact, robust, and suitable for handheld use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the metallic twist bit, flared chuck, and the 'DRILCO' branding on the battery pack.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the ergonomic handle, trigger button, battery pack, and the full length of the drill bit.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the streamlined back of the drill and the symmetrical design of the handle and battery pack.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the handle, battery pack, and drill bit from the other side.
